title: Oura Ring Introduces 40 Percent Thinner Model, While Clearing Out Previous Units at Steep Discount
summary: Oura's latest generation is officially the smallest smart ring on the market.

title: Long-term unemployment is surging in the U.S. There are hidden costs for workers and the economy
summary: Long-term unemployment can have ramifications on financial, emotional and family health that linger even after reentry into the workforce.
